channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I fundamentally don’t understand who the GameSir Pocket Taco is for — and, after testing the Game-Boy-style clamshell mobile controller, I’m not sure it does either
item.description: I tried out the GameSir Pocket Taco, a vertical mobile controller that’s fun on paper but marred by its muddled execution.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, June 7 (game #1595)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, June 7 (game #1092)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, June 7 (game #826)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.
